companies.name: Unicon Aluminum Roof Company
companies.about: We supply and install quality and durable aluminum roof materials of all kinds which includes: lonspan aluminum roof sheets, step-tiles aluminum roof sheets, metcoppo aluminum roof sheets and metro/stone coated aluminum roof sheets. You can find all these materials in various thickness ranging from 0.4mm to 0.7mm in different colors of your choice. Our service is of high quality, cost effective and fast as possible.

companies.name: Uni Bio-Digester Company
companies.about: Uni Bio-Digester Company apply high technique using durable and high quality materials to construct bio-digester that can replace your normal septic tank while converting you toilet and kitchen waste to cooking gas and farm fertilizer. With Uni Bio-Digester you can maximize your money while periodically collecting gas for cooking and fertilizer for enriching your farm products and even sale to others if you may not need them.

companies.name: Unicon Solar Solution
companies.about: In Unicon Solar Solution, we deliver and install high quality and durable solar power to meet your electricity demand. We install efficient solar electric generator of different capacity to power appliances of your choice including home, business and industrial applications at affordable prize. With efficient solar panels, our products start charging at 6:35am and stops charging by 6:40pm and can power all your appliances through the hours of no sunlight with the help of our deep circle betteries available at your service.

companies.name: Unicon WindChill Company
companies.about: Unicon windchill is the leading producer of windchill in Edo state with a track record of over four decades of experience in the windchill industry. With the safety of the health of your family and you in mind, we have been able to automate and revolutionize the windchill industry such that your windows understand the weather condition and automatically adjust itself to suite and promote healthy living while protecting you and your family from wind hazard. Because we have understood the economic situation over the years, we have been able to make our products affordable while maintaining high standard and quality throughout our products.

companies.name: Winners White Water Rafting Company
companies.about: Winner White Water Rafting company is highly experienced company in the water rafting industry. With 40 decades of experience in operation, we've understand the value of and prioritized safety of our customers. Haven't invested in safety measures, with safety engineers and machine, your safety is guaranteed.

companies.name: Unicon Audio Systems
companies.about: In Unicon Audio Systems, we produce both outdoor and indoor audio equipments. Because we prioritize quality sound and safety from electric hazard that's why we have equipt our audio systems with AI applications that enable user to operate them with voice command matched with children account options. Our products are cost effective and user friendly. Because of our quality and safety features together with our cost effective approach, products by Unicon Audio Systems are choices you can't trade for other options.

companies.name: Unicon Softwares
companies.about: Unicon Softwares is an innovative tech company pride in safe, clean and maintainable software for the varieties of application. We produce softwares applicable in diverse industries including transportation, banking and finance, security, drone application, military, survelance, agriculture and more.
